name: Irish Potato Candy (Without Potatoes)
recipeIngredient: Blanched almond bits or pine nuts
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jacqueline Bernhart/Pittsburgh P.G.
Combine sugar, milk, butter, cream of tartar and salt in saucepan. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally. Cover pan. Cook syrup to 234 degrees Fahrenheit or until a few drops form a soft ball when tested in cold water. Uncover occasionally during cooking and stir gently. Let syrup stand undisturbed until lukewarm. Add vanilla. Beat syrup until creamy. Add coconut and blend. Shape candy into small pieces. Blend cinnamon and cocoa. Roll candy in cinnamon mixture and coat well. Insert bits of blanched almonds or pine nuts to resemble eyes.
Per piece: 68 calories, 1.4 g fat, 18%CFF.
